calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-13-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg for Jason Wroten. Steve Schroeder for Inheritance Funding.

The Court stated that Estate funds should not be placed in an Attorney Trust account and informed Mr. Schroeder that he/Inheritance Funding does not have authority to dictate where funds are to be held. The accounting petition was taken under submission. The Court will address calculation of interest.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2011 Granted Per Written Order
